elements.text: Your friend invites you to a dinner party and after you leave, they casually mention that one of the people there had been sick and was waiting on a test result. You can’t believe your friend wouldn’t tell you this before they took you to the party. You decide to talk to your friend about it, and they decide to communicate better about risky...

elements.name: Late Communication_Physical Health_puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
